student-management-jdbc.overview:
Full CRUD student management system backed by MySQL.

Features to build:
• Add Student
• Update Student
• Delete Student
• Search Student
• View Students

Requirements:
• Use JDBC with PreparedStatement
• MySQL database
• DAO pattern

Bonus:
• Export student list to CSV
student-management-jdbc.explanation: Student Management System is a advanced-level project (Week 7). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Add Student, Update Student, Delete Student, Search Student, View Students.
student-management-jdbc.youtubeLabel: Java JDBC Full Course — Connect Java to MySQL
student-management-jdbc.studyNote:
1. Watch the YouTube tutorial first.
2. Open the GitHub repo — clone or browse the source.
3. Build your version feature-by-feature in IntelliJ.
4. Test each feature before moving on.
5. Mark complete when your project works end-to-end.

employee-management-jdbc.overview:
Employee CRUD with department filtering and salary search.

Features to build:
• Employee CRUD
• Department Filter
• Salary Search

Requirements:
• Use JDBC
• MySQL database
• PreparedStatement for all queries

Bonus:
• Salary statistics dashboard

library-management-jdbc.overview:
Library system for managing books, issuing, and returns.

Features to build:
• Add Books
• Issue Books
• Return Books
• Search Books

Requirements:
• Use JDBC
• MySQL database
• Track book availability

Bonus:
• Overdue book alerts

inventory-management-jdbc.overview:
Product inventory with quantity tracking and low stock alerts.

Features to build:
• Product CRUD
• Quantity Update
• Low Stock Alert

Requirements:
• Use JDBC
• MySQL database
• Transaction support for quantity updates

Bonus:
• Reorder threshold configuration

hospital-management-jdbc.overview:
Hospital system for patient registration, doctors, and appointments.

Features to build:
• Patient Registration
• Doctor Information
• Appointment Records

Requirements:
• Use JDBC
• MySQL database
• Relational schema with foreign keys

Bonus:
• Appointment scheduling conflict check
